calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-30-2004 Continued To Oct-04-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-04-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Jonathan Seigel, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ritz Apartments De LLc.
No appearance by the defaulted Defendant: Kenneth Sarda, Co-Defendant: Michael Edgar not present for Trial.
11:50 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Robert Boulanger, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Rental Agreement dtd. 8-15-03-----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice and Five day notice dtd. 8-2-4-----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Ltr. dtd 8-24-04------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4- Copy of photos--------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises located at 300 Buchanan #310, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Back rent and per diem damages $1,960.00
Costs $183.30, for a total of $2,143.30.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2004 Off Calendar
